description: Artifact (80KB) exceeds max_file_bytes (50000) but is below max_bundle_bytes. Assembler MUST emit narrow_scope_required error rather than summarizing the artifact (Task 5 Behavioral Rule 1).

expected_assembler_output.error_message: Artifact (80000 bytes) exceeds max_file_bytes (50000). Multi-model review cannot proceed at full fidelity. Narrow review scope (smaller diff, single file) and retry.
